query: SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME, REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'reservations' AND REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME IS NOT NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rp6zCMfN7Vv5FK.root --database AV298FS8t5SaTurBBRqhgQ --execute SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME, REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME FROM information_schema.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'reservations' AND REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME IS NOT NULL;
